pageName: TiDB Cloud Lake: Cloud-Native Analytics Warehouse

meta.title: TiDB Cloud Lake: Cloud-Native Analytics Warehouse
meta.description: TiDB Cloud Lake is a cloud-native analytics warehouse with elastic warehouses, ANSI SQL, vector search, and object storage for modern analytics and AI workloads.

props.headline: Cloud-Native Analytics Warehouse for AI and Modern Analytics
props.subheadline: TiDB Cloud Lake is a cloud-native analytics warehouse built for modern analytics and AI-oriented data workflows, combining elastic warehouses, ANSI SQL analytics, vector search, full-text search, and object storage in one managed service.

props.eyebrow: One Engine for Analytics, Search, and AI
props.title: Why TiDB Cloud Lake

items.title: One Engine for Analytics, Search, and AI
items.description: TiDB Cloud Lake combines ANSI SQL analytics, full-text search, vector search, and geospatial analysis in one cloud-native engine. Analyze structured and semi-structured data, run semantic retrieval, and support AI-oriented workflows without splitting every workload into separate specialized systems

items.title: Elastic Warehouses for Dynamic Workloads
items.description: Create, pause, resize, and scale warehouses based on workload demand. Separate storage and compute so teams can scale analytics performance independently while keeping infrastructure simple - pay as you go

items.title: Built for Modern Data in Object Storage
items.description: Use object storage and semi-structured data processing to support flexible analytics on diverse data types, from operational exports and event data to logs, documents, and AI-ready datasets.

props.title: From Provision to Query in Three Steps
props.subtitle: Simple setup and seamless integration with your data stack.

items.title: 1. Provision a Warehouse
items.description: Create a TiDB Cloud Lake warehouse from the console. Choose a size, pause, or resize any time to match workload demand.

items.title: Query Your Data in Place
items.description: Use ANSI SQL analytics, full-text search, vector search, and geospatial functions to explore, analyze, and retrieve data from object storage.

items.title: Connect Your Stack
items.description: Point Tableau, Looker, dbt, or your ML pipeline at the warehouse endpoint. Real-time insights and AI-ready workflows in minutes.

items.a: TiDB Cloud Lake is a cloud-native analytics warehouse built for modern analytics and AI-oriented data workflows.

items.q: How is TiDB Cloud Lake priced?
items.a: Pay-as-you-go for warehouse compute, storage and cluster services, consolidated on your TiDB Cloud invoice.

items.q: Who is TiDB Cloud Lake for?
items.a: TiDB Cloud Lake is designed for analytics workloads such as BI and reporting, log and event analytics, semi-structured data analytics, full-text search, vector search, geospatial analysis, and AI-oriented data workflows.

items.q: Is TiDB Cloud Lake available now?
items.a: TiDB Cloud Lake is now in. Public Preview

props.title: Ready to Unify OLTP, Analytics, and AI on One Platform?
props.subtitle: Start free in TiDB Cloud and request Private Beta access to TiDB Cloud Lake today.
